meta.title: About GEONYX | Geopolymer Engineering Company
meta.description: GEONYX GROUP LTD – a Bulgarian engineering company developing high-technology geopolymer matrices for industrial infrastructure and critical facilities.

hero.title: WE ARE GEONYX.
hero.description: Pioneers in the development and implementation of high-technology geopolymer matrices. We are not merely suppliers of construction materials. We are a technology company redefining the lifecycle of industrial infrastructure.

philosophy.title: THE END OF PLANNED OBSOLESCENCE
philosophy.body1: Industry evolves, but infrastructure lags behind. Standard concrete is a 19th-century technology, and epoxy resins are petrochemical compromises with a short lifespan. Our mission is to break the cycle of constant repairs (Downtime).
philosophy.body2: By creating inorganic matrices, we transform the most vulnerable link in your plant — the floor — into your most durable structural asset. We engineer for a 50-year operational lifecycle.

rd.title: LABORATORY PRECISION AND INNOVATION
rd.body1: The strength of GEONYX lies in our research and development activity. We do not blend off-the-shelf commercial resins. We synthesise our own geopolymer crystalline lattices at the molecular level.
rd.body2: Every formula undergoes relentless stress tests for thermodynamic stability, chemical inertness and compressive strength, verified by independent European laboratories and materials testing institutes.

liability.title: ONE GUARANTEE. ZERO LIABILITY SHIFTING.
liability.body1: In construction, the greatest risk is divided responsibility — the manufacturer blames the contractor, and the contractor blames the concrete. GEONYX closes the loop.
liability.body2: We manufacture the technology, we conduct the structural audit of the site, and we certify the execution. You receive a single partner, one uncompromising guarantee and absolute legal certainty.

qaqc.title: CERTIFIED TECHNICIANS AND PROTOCOLS
qaqc.body1: Working with high-technology mineral matrices requires clinical discipline, not general labourers. Our implementation teams (Certified Application Technicians) operate under strict engineering protocols (Method Statements).
qaqc.body2: From Dew Point monitoring to real-time exothermic reaction control. We guarantee minimal downtime for your production through strict adherence to scheduled time-slots.

esg.title: A LOW-CARBON FUTURE
esg.body1: Corporate responsibility demands a radical reduction of the carbon footprint. Unlike the energy-intensive production of Portland cement and the toxic petrochemistry of epoxies, GEONYX technologies save up to 80% CO2 emissions.
esg.body2: Our systems are 100% solvent-free (VOC-Free) and contribute directly to meeting the criteria for LEED and BREEAM certification of your green buildings.

certs.title: OFFICIAL STANDARDS OF TRUST
certs.c1body: Quality Management System (QMS). Subject to continuous independent audit.
certs.c2body: Environmental Management. Zero waste to landfill and emissions control.
certs.c3body: Occupational Health & Safety. Institutionalised protection of health at work.
certs.c4body: Full compliance with EU directives on chemical safety and hygiene.

cta.title: TRUST THE SCIENCE.
cta.body: Contact our engineering team for technical expertise, quantitative analysis and a structural audit of your site.
